topic: Security Group Configuration

  entities:

    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|SecurityGroup
    vpc-0f81e2d959d7be034|VPC

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has VpcId 'vpc-0f81e2d959d7be034']

    entity-entity relationships:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_VPC_ID|vpc-0f81e2d959d7be034

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has SecurityGroupArn 'arn:aws:ec2:us-east-1:1234567890:security-group/sg-08526dcf557ad13aa']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_SECURITY_GROUP_ARN|arn:aws:ec2:us-east-1:1234567890:security-group/sg-08526dcf557ad13aa

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has OwnerId '1234567890']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_OWNER_ID|1234567890

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has GroupName 'NeptuneQuickStart-NeptuneStack-RJ9H6B5T5L0K-NeptuneSG-ldTVhxFS6f25']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_GROUP_NAME|NeptuneQuickStart-NeptuneStack-RJ9H6B5T5L0K-NeptuneSG-ldTVhxFS6f25

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has Description 'Allow Neptune DBPort Access']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_DESCRIPTION|Allow Neptune DBPort Access

topic: IP Permissions Egress Rules

  entities:

    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|SecurityGroup

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissionsEgress with IpProtocol '-1']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_EGRESS_WITH_IP_PROTOCOL|-1

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissionsEgress with UserIdGroupPairs None]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_EGRESS_WITH_USER_ID_GROUP_PAIRS|None

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissionsEgress with IpRanges with CidrIp '0.0.0.0/0']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_EGRESS_WITH_IP_RANGES_WITH_CIDR_IP|0.0.0.0/0

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissionsEgress with Ipv6Ranges None]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_EGRESS_WITH_IPV6_RANGES|None

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissionsEgress with PrefixListIds None]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_EGRESS_WITH_PREFIX_LIST_IDS|None

topic: IP Permissions Ingress Rules

  entities:

    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|SecurityGroup

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with IpProtocol 'tcp']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_IP_PROTOCOL|tcp

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with FromPort 8182]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_FROM_PORT|8182

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with ToPort 8182]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_TO_PORT|8182

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with UserIdGroupPairs None]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_USER_ID_GROUP_PAIRS|None

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with IpRanges with CidrIp '0.0.0.0/0']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_IP_RANGES_WITH_CIDR_IP|0.0.0.0/0

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with IpRanges with Description 'http access']

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_IP_RANGES_WITH_DESCRIPTION|http access

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with Ipv6Ranges None]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_IPV6_RANGES|None

  proposition: [The SecurityGroup with GroupId 'sg-08526dcf557ad13aa' has IpPermissions with PrefixListIds None]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    sg-08526dcf557ad13aa|HAS_IP_PERMISSIONS_WITH_PREFIX_LIST_IDS|None
